song.title: Great Is Your Love
song.author: Ross King
song.lyrics:
[C] . E B I will praise You O Lord my God . A B E With all of my heart I will glorify Your name forever.
(Repeat)| .E B A B E Great is Your love to me, You have delivered me.
(Repeat)
[V1] .C#m F#m Hear the passion of my prayer O Lord, .A B E All of my life I give to praise Your name. .C#m F#m A Your forgiveness and Your mercy are the only way . B That I can get to You to say…
[V2] Just to know You is to be alive. Your love has lifted me up from my grave. You have rescued me from sin and I am here today Just to come to You and say…
